name: createInvoiceLink
description: Use this method to create a link for an invoice

parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which the link will be created. For payments in Telegram Stars only.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Product name, 1-32 characters

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Product description, 1-255 characters

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: Bot-defined invoice payload, 1-128 bytes. This will not be displayed to the user, use it for your internal processes.

parameters.name: provider_token
parameters.description: Payment provider token, obtained via @BotFather. Pass an empty string for payments in Telegram Stars.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code, see more on currencies. Pass “XTR” for payments in Telegram Stars.

parameters.name: prices
parameters.description: Price breakdown, a JSON-serialized list of components (e.g. product price, tax, discount, delivery cost, delivery tax, bonus, etc.). Must contain exactly one item for payments in Telegram Stars.

parameters.name: subscription_period
parameters.description: The number of seconds the subscription will be active for before the next payment. The currency must be set to “XTR” (Telegram Stars) if the parameter is used. Currently, it must always be 2592000 (30 days) if specified. Any number of subscriptions can be active for a given bot at the same time, including multiple concurrent subscriptions from the same user. Subscription price must no exceed 10000 Telegram Stars.

parameters.name: max_tip_amount
parameters.description: The maximum accepted amount for tips in the smallest units of the currency (integer, not float/double). For example, for a maximum tip of US$ 1.45 pass max_tip_amount = 145. See the exp parameter in currencies.json, it shows the number of digits past the decimal point for each currency (2 for the majority of currencies). Defaults to 0. Not supported for payments in Telegram Stars.

parameters.name: suggested_tip_amounts
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized array of suggested amounts of tips in the smallest units of the currency (integer, not float/double). At most 4 suggested tip amounts can be specified. The suggested tip amounts must be positive, passed in a strictly increased order and must not exceed max_tip_amount.

parameters.name: provider_data
parameters.description: JSON-serialized data about the invoice, which will be shared with the payment provider. A detailed description of required fields should be provided by the payment provider.

parameters.name: photo_url
parameters.description: URL of the product photo for the invoice. Can be a photo of the goods or a marketing image for a service.

parameters.name: photo_size
parameters.description: Photo size in bytes

parameters.name: photo_width
parameters.description: Photo width

parameters.name: photo_height
parameters.description: Photo height

parameters.name: need_name
parameters.description: Pass True if you require the user's full name to complete the order. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars.

parameters.name: need_phone_number
parameters.description: Pass True if you require the user's phone number to complete the order. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars.

parameters.name: need_email
parameters.description: Pass True if you require the user's email address to complete the order. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars.

parameters.name: need_shipping_address
parameters.description: Pass True if you require the user's shipping address to complete the order. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars.

parameters.name: send_phone_number_to_provider
parameters.description: Pass True if the user's phone number should be sent to the provider. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars.

parameters.name: send_email_to_provider
parameters.description: Pass True if the user's email address should be sent to the provider. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars.

parameters.name: is_flexible
parameters.description: Pass True if the final price depends on the shipping method. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars.
